notes: Runtime approval never approves model artifacts or datasets. Optional adapters may be not_shipped without breaking the manual Coverage workflow.

application_packages.name: cryptography

application_packages.name: keyring

application_packages.checksum_policy: pip hash checking when lockfile present; version pin in requirements
application_packages.notes: Stores only the master key, never case content.

model_runtimes.notes: Selecting this runtime does not approve any model weights, tokenizers, templates, conversions, or quantizations.

model_runtimes.name: Ollama
model_runtimes.provenance: approved optional local OpenAI-compatible runtime (issue 78); not required for manual workflow

model_artifacts.name: (none shipped in core path)

model_artifacts.notes: Any future model artifact requires independent inventory approval. Runtime approval is insufficient.

datasets.name: RxNorm Current Prescribable Content
datasets.provenance: approved conditional adapter source (issue 78); identity mapping only
datasets.checksum_policy: pin release archive sha256 when adapter is enabled
datasets.redistribution: follow NLM terms; public domain U.S. Government Work for CPC subset only
datasets.attribution: U.S. National Library of Medicine RxNorm CPC
datasets.notes: Full RxNorm / RxNav-in-a-Box is rejected. CPC only.

datasets.name: DailyMed bulk SPL
datasets.provenance: approved conditional adapter source (issue 78); dated label passages only
datasets.checksum_policy: pin bulk revision and file checksums when adapter is enabled

datasets.name: openFDA
datasets.provenance: approved conditional adapter source (issue 78); dated recalls/shortages/labels/report counts only
datasets.checksum_policy: pin download revision and checksums when adapter is enabled
datasets.notes: Adverse-event counts do not establish causation.

datasets.name: DrugCentral
datasets.provenance: approved conditional adapter source (issue 78); attribution and share-alike required
datasets.checksum_policy: pin dump revision and checksum when adapter is enabled
datasets.redistribution: share-alike; keep attribution isolated from unrelated artifacts

datasets.name: CMS NADAC
datasets.provenance: approved conditional adapter source (issue 78); acquisition-cost benchmark only
datasets.checksum_policy: pin weekly file revision and checksum when adapter is enabled
datasets.notes: Never present as patient cash price, insured price, or pharmacy quote.

datasets.name: CMS NPPES
datasets.provenance: approved conditional adapter source (issue 78); identity and taxonomy only
datasets.checksum_policy: pin monthly dump checksum when adapter is enabled
datasets.notes: Never claim network participation, licensure, availability, quality, or appointment access.

datasets.name: GoodRx
datasets.rejection_reason: proprietary / paid / partnership-gated price data excluded by issue 78

datasets.name: Synthea-compatible synthetic fixtures
datasets.provenance: synthetic test data only; never real PHI
datasets.attribution: Synthea (Apache-2.0) inspiration; HealthAdvocate synthetic fixtures are local
datasets.notes: Tests generate synthetic fixtures directly. Real medical/insurance data is forbidden.
